experiment: WH- VQE — QPU single-point validation at simulator-optimal theta*

mitigation_detail.note: Zero-Noise Extrapolation via gate folding plus twirled readout mitigation. Suppresses systematic hardware bias by extrapolating from amplified-noise runs; ~3x the QPU executions of an unmitigated run. Does not remove bias entirely.

interpretation: delta_E AFTER Zero-Noise Extrapolation (+ twirled readout mitigation) on the same 6-qubit, ~30-layer EfficientSU2(reps=4, full) circuit. ZNE estimates and subtracts systematic hardware bias by extrapolating from deliberately noise-amplified runs; the residual delta_E reflects extrapolation error plus un-mitigated shot noise. Compare against the unmitigated baseline (wh_qpu_validation_<date>.json, delta_E ~ +199.8 mHa) to quantify how much mitigation recovers. At this circuit depth ZNE is near the edge of reliability, so treat the mitigated value as a methodology data point, not a chemistry result.
retention_note: IBM Open plan typically retains job records for ~30 days.
